en.text: I am the fruit of action
will surely attain the supreme destination
I am the act of offering
I am the fire sacrifices Agniṣṭoma, Atyāgniṣṭoma, Uktha, Ṣoḍaśi, Atirātra, Aptoryāma and Vājapeya, collectively known as Jyotiṣṭoma
I am the obsequial oblation offered to the ancestors
I am the five types of sacrifices to demigod deities such as the Viśvadevas and others according to the smṛti scriptures
I am the ghee (clarified butter) and other sacrificial ingredients
with exclusive devotion (giving up all other endeavours such as karma and jñān)
in this pure life of devotion for Me
but not in a way appropriate to attaining Me
partake of that – I affectionately accept
from inauspiciousness, or, from all that is opposed to devotion
the Supreme Lord of all beings
as the origin of all that be
the ordainer of the living beings’ fruits of actions
and unfailingly following the devotional observances such as Ekādaśī and regular chanting of the Holy Name
coming and going in this world
knowledge of pure devotion for Me (singing My glories which expands into unlimited services)
With a new day of Brahmā
of My form of human features
are situated in Me, the infinite
singing the glories of My divine Name, form, etc
on the path of death in the material world
offering obeisances unto Me and following all the practices of devotion
who are exclusively devoted to Me
earnestly aspiring for their eternal relationship with Me
with the exhaustion of their peity
Viṣṇu, but in the form of demigods, conscious of differentiation
With mind linked to Me by renouncing the fruits of your actions
At all times, in all places and circumstances
who take the remnants of soma-rasa, a beverage made from the soma creeper, dear to the demigods
to attain the heavenly plane, the abode of the demigods
Performers of the fruitive rituals of the Ṛg-, Yajur- and Sāma-vedas
the worship prescribed in three of the Vedas
those actions of manifestation, sustenance, and withdrawal
up to direct realisation of Me
as the cosmic or universal form
by sacrifice, but indirectly through the demigods
striving to learn spiritual truths of My transcendental nature, personality, etc
the responsibility of providing and protecting the necessities

ru.text: другие атрибуты жертвоприношения, такие как масло и зерна
беспрестанный круговорот в этом бренном мире
на этом пути отречения от мирского
у человека очень дурные поступки или характер
знатоки трех Вед (Р̣г, Йаджур и Са̄ма Веды)
